lines.raw: Lesson 97 | 第97课
A small blue case | 一个蓝色小箱子

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: Does Mr. Hall get his case back?
lines.chinese: 霍尔先生拿回他的箱子了吗？
lines.raw: Does Mr. Hall get his case back? | 霍尔先生拿回他的箱子了吗？

lines.english: I left a suitcase on the train to London the other day.
lines.chinese: 前几天我把一个手提箱忘在去伦敦的火车上了。
lines.raw: I left a suitcase on the train to London the other day. | 前几天我把一个手提箱忘在去伦敦的火车上了。

lines.chinese: 先生，您能描述一下它吗？
lines.raw: Can you describe it, sir? | 先生，您能描述一下它吗？

lines.english: It's a small blue case and it's got a zip.
lines.chinese: 那是一个蓝色小箱子，有拉链。
lines.raw: It's a small blue case and it's got a zip. | 那是一个蓝色小箱子，有拉链。

lines.english: There's a label on the handle with my name and address on it.
lines.chinese: 把手上有一个标签，上面有我的姓名和地址。
lines.raw: There's a label on the handle with my name and address on it. | 把手上有一个标签，上面有我的姓名和地址。
Is this case yours? | 这个箱子是您的吗？
No, that's not mine. | 不，那不是我的。
What about this one? | 这个呢？
This one's got a label. | 这个上面有标签。
Let me see it. | 让我看看。

lines.chinese: 您的姓名和地址是什么？
lines.raw: What's your name and address? | 您的姓名和地址是什么？
David Hall, 83, Bridge Street. | 大卫·霍尔，桥街83号。
That's right. | 对。
D. N. Hall, 83, Bridge Street. | D. N. 霍尔，桥街83号。
Three pounds fifty pence, please. | 请付三英镑五十便士。
Here you are. | 给你。
Thank you. | 谢谢。
Hey! | 嘿！
What's the matter? | 怎么了？

lines.english: This case doesn't belong to me!
lines.raw: This case doesn't belong to me! | 这个箱子不是我的！

lines.english: You've given me the wrong case!
lines.raw: You've given me the wrong case! | 你把箱子给我弄错了！
